action.reasoning: The root task requires producing localized launch kits for 6 markets and a global consistency review. This is a large, parallelizable workload. I will spawn 6 independent subtasks, one per market, each responsible for producing the announcement post, FAQ, and pricing page copy for their locale. I will take the self_role of conducting the global consistency review, gated on the completion of all 6 market subtasks. This decomposition ensures parallel execution and clear ownership.
